01 / 06

The Problem Every Chicago Fleet Operator Knows

Your Vans Are Already on the Road. They're Just Not Working for You.

Every unwrapped service van driving Chicago's neighborhoods is a missed impression. Every white panel without a phone number is a call that went to a competitor. And every cheap wrap that peeled after one winter is money spent twice. You need graphics that survive Chicago's freeze-thaw cycles, communicate your brand at 40 mph, and pay back the investment in leads — not a logo sticker that looks dated by spring.

Pain Point 01 — Branding

Invisible Fleet = Lost Leads

Your trucks are driving 40,000+ impressions per day through the exact neighborhoods you serve. Without brand graphics, every one of those impressions benefits your wrapped competitor — not you.

Pain Point 02 — Durability

Cheap Vinyl Doesn't Survive Chicago

Calendered vinyl fails within 18 months in Chicago's freeze-thaw cycles. Peeling edges, lifting seams, fading print — a $1,500 wrap that fails twice costs more than one premium cast vinyl install that runs 6 years.

Pain Point 03 — ROI

Most Shops Don't Know the Tax Angle

Commercial vehicle wraps are IRS Section 179 advertising expenses — 100% deductible in the year of purchase. A $3,750 cargo van wrap in the 28% bracket costs you $2,700 after tax. Most wrap shops never tell you this.

The Chicago Standard

Most Shops Learn on Your Vehicle. This Team Has 5,000+ Commercial Wraps Behind Them.

Since 2014, Chicago Fleet Wraps has handled commercial fleet programs for Amazon DSP operators, regional distributors, trade contractors, and national brands. Every install uses Avery Dennison MPI 1105 or 3M IJ180-CV3 cast vinyl — not calendered, not economy.

Service Area

Wrapping Fleets Across Chicagoland

Free fleet pickup in Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, Will, and McHenry Counties.

How much does a fleet wrap cost in Chicago?

Fleet wrap pricing in Chicago is based on vehicle square footage and vinyl tier. Premium cast vinyl (Avery Dennison MPI 1105 / 3M IJ180-CV3) is $9.75/sqft and color change wraps are $8.25/sqft. Cargo van full wraps start at $3,750, Sprinter van wraps from $4,700, and box truck wraps range from $5,000–$10,900 depending on length (12–26 ft). All prices include custom design, Avery Dennison or 3M cast vinyl, professional installation, and free pickup throughout Chicagoland. Fleet discounts: 3% for 2–4 vehicles, 7% for 5–9, 11% for 10–24, and 15% for 25+. Use our Instant Wrap Price Calculator for exact pricing on 310+ work vehicles.

Are vehicle wraps worth it for small businesses?

Yes. A single wrapped vehicle generates 30,000–70,000 daily impressions at a cost of just $0.04–$0.07 per 1,000 impressions — compared to $6–$12 for Google Ads. Vehicle wraps are also 100% tax deductible under IRS Section 179. With a 5–7 year lifespan, a fleet wrap delivers 2,500–5,000% ROI over its lifetime, making it the most cost-effective advertising for local service businesses.

How long do commercial vehicle wraps last?

Commercial vehicle wraps using premium cast vinyl (Avery Dennison MPI 1105 or 3M IJ180-CV3) are rated for 5–7 years of outdoor use. With proper care — hand washing, avoiding automated brush car washes, and keeping pressure washers below 1,200 PSI — fleet wraps in Chicago regularly last 6–7 years looking sharp despite harsh winters, road salt, and UV exposure.

What is the best material for commercial vehicle wraps?

Cast vinyl is the industry standard for commercial fleet wraps. Chicago Fleet Wraps exclusively uses Avery Dennison MPI 1105 and 3M IJ180-CV3 — both premium cast vinyl films rated for 5–7 years outdoor. Cast vinyl conforms to curves and rivets without lifting, unlike cheaper calendered vinyl which shrinks and fails within 1–2 years. Chicago Fleet Wraps guarantees proper application with a 2-year workmanship warranty.

Meet the Owner

24+ Years. 9,400+ Vehicles. One Standard.

Roy — Founder & Lead Installer

Started wrapping vehicles in Las Vegas in 2001 when the industry was still figuring itself out. Moved operations to Chicago in 2014. Since then, Chicago Fleet Wraps has completed over 9,400 vehicle installations and manages 2,800+ fleet accounts across Chicagoland.

Every installation is personally overseen. No subcontractors. No shortcuts. The facility runs HP Latex printers for Pantone-matched output and maintains zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years of operation.
